/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/zookeeper_test.dir/src/LrpcApplication.cc.o CMakeFiles/zookeeper_test.dir/src/LrpcConfig.cc.o CMakeFiles/zookeeper_test.dir/src/LrpcProvider.cc.o CMakeFiles/zookeeper_test.dir/example/callee/Lservice.cc.o CMakeFiles/zookeeper_test.dir/user/user.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/zookeeper_test.dir/src/zookeeperutil.cc.o -o zookeeper_test  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so -lzookeeper_mt
